name: Black Russian Cake
recipeInstructions:
--------------------------MILK CHOCOLATE FROSTING--------------------------
1/2 package Milk chocolate frosting mix
1/2 cup Powdered sugar
1 tablespoon Hot water
3/4 cup Water
1/2 cup Butter, softened
3/4 cup Oil
1 tablespoon Brandy
1/4 cup Vodka
1 tablespoon Orange liqueur (e.g., Tia Maria or cream de cacao)
1/4 teaspoon Almond extract
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Prepare the cake batter by mixing together the yellow cake mix, instant chocolate pudding, eggs, and cinnamon in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Pour the batter into a greased and floured Bundt pan.
4. Bake for 45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
5. Allow the cake to cool completely at least 10 minutes in the pan before turning it out onto a wire rack to cool.
6. Prepare the milk chocolate frosting by combining all ingredients in a small mixing bowl. Beat with an electric mixer on low speed for one minute, then on high speed for two minutes until smooth and spreadable.
7. Once the cake has cooled completely, frost generously with the milk chocolate frosting.
